name: Acarbose
summary: Acarbose is tracked for Inhibits intestinal alpha-glucosidases, delaying carbohydrate digestion and postprandial glucose absorption with conservative evidence framing. Treat dosing and outcomes as review-gated unless PMID-backed human evidence is present.
